titleStmt.title: SII 26.358: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 358. (A.R. No. 339 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a sandhi lamp to the temple of the god Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiya-nāyanār of Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr in Maṇaviṟkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Kākku-nāyakaṉ alias Teṉṉavaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ Varantarum Perumāḷ, a Dēśi-vēḷāṉ of Vaigavūr in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkōṭṭam in the same maṇḍalam. It is stated that he endowed a sum of 10 paṇam which was received by four Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple, viz. Araśampiḷḷai, Tāḻi-bhaṭṭaṉ and Tiruvallamuḍaiyāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ, all of Gautama-[gōtra] and Poṟkōyilnambi of Kāśiva (Kāśyapa)-gōtra, who had agreed to burn the sandhi lamp from the month of Āvaṇi of the year quoted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvicaiyakaṇṭakopālatevarkku yāṇṭu Irupatteṭṭāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattuk kūvamāṉa tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiya nāyanārkku Immaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu vaikavūr
tteciveḷāṉ kākkunāyakaṉāṉa teṉṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ varantarumperumāḷ pakkal Ikkoyil civappirāmaṇaril gautamaṉ Aracampiḷḷaiyum gautamaṉ tāḻipaṭṭaṉum gautamaṉ tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉum kācivaṉ poṟkoyil nam
pi Ivvāṇṭai Āvaṇimātamutal Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkuc canti viḷakku Erikka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭap paṇam pattu Ippaṇam pattu rātittavarai Erippatākap poliyūṭṭākak kai Ivai ceṉ�
Ivai poṉṉampalakkūttaṉ tāḻipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ Ulakāḷuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivaipoṟkoyil nampi comaṉātevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.358 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
